category_sources: source_facts.description says PHP Extension installer; official README says Pickle installs PHP extensions and is based on Composer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pickle; official GitHub README title is pickle - PHP Extension installer.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation and usage surface for Pickle.

tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe installing PHP extensions, PECL support, Composer basis, and command-line phar usage.
